entities.name: CLAVICEPS FUSIFORMIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that is the causal agent of pearl millet ergot.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The host crop affected by Claviceps fusiformis.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET ERGOT
entities.description: The disease caused by the fungus Claviceps fusiformis in pearl millet.

entities.name: MORPHOLOGY
entities.description: Physical characteristics including the shape, size, and cavities of sclerotia and the size and viability of conidia.

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY
entities.description: The ability of the pathogen isolates to cause disease in the host crop.

entities.name: SCLEROTIA
entities.description: Hardened fungal masses produced by Claviceps fusiformis, examined for size, weight, and cavities.

entities.name: MACROCONIDIA
entities.description: Large asexual spores of the fungus studied for size, viability, and germination time.

entities.name: MICROCONIDIA
entities.description: Small asexual spores of the fungus studied for size and viability.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the pathogen isolates were collected.

entities.name: AURANGABAD
entities.description: A location in India where pathogen isolates were collected.

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTRE
entities.description: A location in India where pathogen isolates were collected.

entities.name: MYSORE
entities.description: A location in India where pathogen isolates were collected.

entities.name: KOVILPATTI
entities.description: A location in India where pathogen isolates were collected.

entities.name: JOBNER
entities.description: A location in India where pathogen isolates were collected.

entities.name: PUNE
entities.description: A location in India where pathogen isolates were collected.

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY TEST
entities.description: A test using culture inoculum on resistant and susceptible pearl millet genotypes to evaluate virulence.

entities.name: KIRCHOFF'S AGAR
entities.description: The growth medium used to study the growth characteristics of the isolates.

entities.name: STERILE DISTILLED WATER
entities.description: The medium used to initiate the germination of macroconidia.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The environmental condition, specifically 25 °C, used for germination and growth studies.

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The degree of pathogenicity exhibited by different isolates of the fungus.
